Describe the movement status of the person on the two-wheeled vehicle throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the person wearing a dark helmet rides on gravel; at 4s, a second person gestures nearby while the rider balances; at 10s, the vehicle becomes stationary on the path; at 16s, the vehicle starts moving again; at 18s, the person continues riding along the dirt path.

question: Describe the rider's posture and equipment usage during the sequence.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the rider wears a helmet and dark jacket while balancing; at 4s, the rider maintains balance near a standing observer; at 10s, the rider stands stationary on the vehicle; at 16s, the rider holds onto the handlebars as motion resumes; at 18s, the rider continues navigating the gravel path upright.
